request: You are Reviewer R3 retry: native instruction authority and memory precedence reviewer for DinoBrain. Work read-only. Re-review after fixes. Inspect <machine-local-path> docs\OS_REMAINING_GAPS_CONSENSUS_PLAN.md, docs\OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS.md, docs\VERIFICATION.md, AGENTS.md, src\native-instruction-authority.ts, scripts\verify-native-instruction-authority.mjs, scripts\verify-closed-loop-goal.mjs, and current .dino/state/native_instruction_authority.json. Pay special attention to whether ~/.codex/rules/*.rules and safe-readable Codex/Claude custom instruction surfaces are now scanned or explicitly covered, and whether fixtures catch Codex rules drift and Claude custom instruction drift. Return reviewer_id=R3, verdict=AGREE or REVISE_REQUIRED, blocking_objections[], required_doc_changes[], evidence_files[].
